diff --git a/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts b/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts
index ff5b51047..eb59e3ac2 100644
--- a/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts
+++ b/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts
@@ -12,10 +12,14 @@ export const transformVBindShorthand: NodeTransform = (node, context) => {
   if (node.type === NodeTypes.ELEMENT) {
     for (const prop of node.props) {
       // same-name shorthand - :arg is expanded to :arg="arg"
+      // in browser (in-DOM templates), :foo is parsed as :foo="" by the browser
       if (
         prop.type === NodeTypes.DIRECTIVE &&
         prop.name === 'bind' &&
-        !prop.exp
+        (!prop.exp ||
+          (__BROWSER__ &&
+            prop.exp.type === NodeTypes.SIMPLE_EXPRESSION &&
+            !prop.exp.content.trim()))
       ) {
         const arg = prop.arg!
         if (arg.type !== NodeTypes.SIMPLE_EXPRESSION || !arg.isStatic) {
diff --git a/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/vBind.ts b/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/vBind.ts
index c32df9e36..1f507116f 100644
--- a/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/vBind.ts
+++ b/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/vBind.ts
@@ -27,13 +27,9 @@ export const transformBind: DirectiveTransform = (dir, _node, context) => {
       context.onError(
         createCompilerError(ErrorCodes.X_V_BIND_NO_EXPRESSION, loc),
       )
-      return {
-        props: [
-          createObjectProperty(arg, createSimpleExpression('', true, loc)),
-        ],
-      }
-    } else {
-      exp = undefined
+    }
+    return {
+      props: [createObjectProperty(arg, createSimpleExpression('', true, loc))],
     }
   }
 
diff --git a/reproduce-issue.ts b/reproduce-issue.ts
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..efb477ed4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/reproduce-issue.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,89 @@
+// Reproduction script for v-bind same-name shorthand crash in in-DOM templates
+// In browser, :param becomes :param="" (empty string attribute value)
+// This simulates what the browser does to bare attributes
+
+import {
+  NodeTypes,
+  type ElementNode,
+  type ObjectExpression,
+  type VNodeCall,
+  baseParse as parse,
+  transform,
+  createSimpleExpression,
+  ConstantTypes,
+} from './packages/compiler-core/src'
+import { transformBind } from './packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/vBind'
+import { transformElement } from './packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformElement'
+import { transformVBindShorthand } from './packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand'
+
+// Simulate what happens in the browser: :param becomes :param=""
+// The parser would create prop.exp = SimpleExpressionNode("") instead of undefined
+
+function parseWithVBind(template: string): ElementNode {
+  const ast = parse(template)
+  transform(ast, {
+    nodeTransforms: [transformVBindShorthand, transformElement],
+    directiveTransforms: {
+      bind: transformBind,
+    },
+  })
+  return ast.children[0] as ElementNode
+}
+
+// Test 1: Normal non-browser behavior - bare attribute without value
+console.log('Test 1: Bare attribute (non-browser, :param without value)')
+try {
+  const node = parseWithVBind(`<div :param />`)
+  const props = (node.codegenNode as VNodeCall).props as ObjectExpression
+  const prop = props.properties[0]
+  console.log('  key:', (prop.key as any).content)
+  console.log('  value:', (prop.value as any).content)
+  console.log('  PASS: key=param, value=param (same-name shorthand)')
+} catch (e: any) {
+  console.log('  FAIL:', e.message)
+}
+
+// Test 2: Simulate browser behavior - :param becomes :param="" (empty string)
+console.log('\nTest 2: Browser-like behavior - :param becomes :param="" (empty string)')
+console.log('  NOTE: This test simulates the browser converting :param to :param=""')
+
+// We need to manually create an AST that simulates the browser case
+// where :param has an empty string expression
+import { NodeTypes as NT } from './packages/compiler-core/src/ast'
+const ast = parse(`<div :param />`)
+const dirNode = ((ast.children[0] as ElementNode).props[0]) as any
+// Manually set exp to empty string (simulating browser parsing)
+dirNode.exp = createSimpleExpression('', false, dirNode.loc, ConstantTypes.NOT_CONSTANT)
+
+try {
+  transform(ast, {
+    nodeTransforms: [transformVBindShorthand, transformElement],
+    directiveTransforms: {
+      bind: transformBind,
+    },
+  })
+  const node = ast.children[0] as ElementNode
+  const props = (node.codegenNode as VNodeCall).props as ObjectExpression
+  const prop = props.properties[0]
+  console.log('  key:', (prop.key as any).content)
+  console.log('  value:', (prop.value as any)?.content)
+  console.log('  PASS: key=param, value=param (same-name shorthand works)')
+} catch (e: any) {
+  console.log('  FAIL:', e.message)
+}
+
+// Test 3: Simulate actual in-DOM template format (browser parses :param as :param="")
+console.log('\nTest 3: Actual in-DOM template (:param="" as browser sends it)')
+try {
+  // In the browser, the innerHTML would contain :param="" 
+  // Vue's parser would parse this as a directive with empty exp
+  const node = parseWithVBind(`<div :param="" />`)
+  const props = (node.codegenNode as VNodeCall).props as ObjectExpression
+  const prop = props.properties[0]
+  console.log('  key:', (prop.key as any).content)
+  console.log('  value:', (prop.value as any)?.content)
+  console.log('  Expected in browser mode: key=param, value=param (same-name shorthand)')
+  console.log('  Expected in non-browser mode: error (empty expression)')
+} catch (e: any) {
+  console.log('  FAIL:', e.message)
+}
